common.hero_title: The Ultimate Guide for your Templates.
common.hero_subtitle: Vue 3, Vite, Tailwind 4, Shadcn, Motion and GSAP. Everything setup and ready to copy paste.
common.features_subtitle: Seamless integration of the best libraries on the market.
common.feat2_desc: Full support for multiple languages with vue-i18n.
common.pricing_subtitle: Scale your business with our infrastructure.
common.faq_a1: No. We use optimized libraries that only trigger animations when elements enter the viewport.
common.faq_q2: How do I add more icons?
common.faq_a2: Just use lucide-vue-next or any other Vue icon library. We have thousands available.
common.faq_q3: Is it easy to change the color scheme?
common.faq_a3: Yes! Everything is based on CSS variables. Change the '--primary' variable and the whole site updates.
common.cta_subtitle: Don't waste time setting up lint, typescript or themes. Focus on your product.
